title: Sollamal Thottu Chellum Thendral Lyrics Dheena
stanzas:
sollaamal thottu chellum thendral
en kaadhal dhevadhaiyin kangal
nenjathil kotti chellum minnal
kannoram minnum aval kaadhal

oru naalaikkulle mella mella
un mounam ennai kolla kolla
indha kaadhalinaal
kaatril parakkum kaagitham aanen

sollaamal thottu chellum thendral
en kaadhal dhevadhaiyin kangal
nenjathil kotti chellum minnal
kannoram minnum aval kaadhal

neruppai vizhungi vitten
oh amilam arundhi vitten
noyaai nenjil nee nuzhaindhaai
marundhai yenadi thara maranthaai
vaalibathin solaiyile ragasiyamaai
poo parithaval nee thaane

sollaamal thottu chellum thendral
en kaadhal dhevadhaiyin kangal
nenjathil kotti chellum minnal
kannoram minnum aval kaadhal

ye pengalin ullam
padu kuzhi enben
vizhundhu ezhunthavan yaar
aazham alandhavan yaar
karaiyai kadandhavan yaar

kaadhal irukkum bayathinil thaan
kadavul bhoomikku varuvathillai
meeri avan
bhoomi vandhaal
dhaadiyudan thaan
alaivaan veedhiyile

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic feelings.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Dheena, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings towards his love interest, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 23, 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sollamal Thottu Chellum Thendral, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, encapsulating the essence of love in a poetic manner. The song's soothing melody and Hariharan's soulful rendition evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. Set against the backdrop of Dheena, it enhances the romantic narrative, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema. The lyrics, penned by Vaali, beautifully articulate the complexities of love, resonating with anyone who has experienced such emotions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sollamal Thottu Chellum Thendral from Dheena is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Hariharan's soulful vocals and Yuvan's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. Dive into this lyrical masterpiece that showcases the poetic brilliance of Vaali and the emotional depth of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: The gentle breeze that comes without saying, my love is like a divine gaze that strikes in the heart, like a lightning flash, that is her love.
One day, slowly, your silence will capture me; this love will turn into a paper that flies in the wind.
The gentle breeze that comes without saying, my love is like a divine gaze that strikes in the heart, like a lightning flash, that is her love.
In love's state, there should be no waiting; isn't it a pleasure like heaven?
I have let go of the fire, oh, I have swallowed the bitterness; you have entered my heart as a sickness, you have become the remedy, you have hidden in the garden of life as a secret flower.
The gentle breeze that comes without saying, my love is like a divine gaze that strikes in the heart, like a lightning flash, that is her love.
Who is the one who fell and got up from the pit of women's hearts? Who is the one who crossed the limits? Who is the one who broke through?
In the fear of love, God does not come to the earth; if he comes to the earth, he will come with a song.
